outputs.candidate_triage_register: SYN-KC-001: packet-eligible; public-safe derived knowledge artifact; not CANON and not source truth. SYN-KC-002: owner-review; candidate may affect approval or authority boundary, so archivist classification stops before promotion. SYN-KC-003: hold-private; candidate includes protected operational context and must not enter public packet or CANON route. SYN-KC-004: rejected; explicit reason: candidate cannot be bounded to the declared candidate_scope_binding.
outputs.bookshelf_placement_decision: Place SYN-KC-001 in packet-eligible inbox only. Place SYN-KC-002 in owner-review queue. Keep SYN-KC-003 in hold-private. Do not place SYN-KC-004 on bookshelf.
outputs.notebooklm_packet_eligibility_note: Only SYN-KC-001 is packet-eligible. Eligibility means it can be prepared as a public-safe packet candidate, not that it is approved, canonical, complete, or source truth.
outputs.owner_review_queue: Queue SYN-KC-002 for owner decision because the candidate may overclaim authority if routed automatically. Owner review must decide whether to reject, hold, revise, or approve a stronger route.
outputs.downstream_route_map: SYN-KC-001 -> packet preparation candidate. SYN-KC-002 -> owner review. SYN-KC-003 -> hold-private, no public downstream. SYN-KC-004 -> rejected, no downstream route.
outputs.boundary_review_note: This calibration stays inside the synthetic contract. It does not claim runtime inspection, hidden evidence, upstream mutation, canon promotion, or source-truth validation.

provenance: Synthetic workflow contract: Knowledge Candidate Triage v0
Synthetic scenario facts and boundary policy supplied in the prompt
gaps: No actual candidate bodies, bookshelf state, or triage policy details were provided beyond the synthetic facts.
No owner decision is available for the owner-review candidate, so no stronger route can be assigned.
downstream_handoff: Prepare SYN-KC-001 as a packet-eligible candidate with explicit non-canon status.
Send SYN-KC-002 to owner review; retain SYN-KC-003 as hold-private; close SYN-KC-004 as rejected.
boundary_review_note: No source truth, CANON authority, hidden reference, tool-use, file-edit, runtime-path, or upstream-mutation claim is made.
no_claims: No claim that any candidate has been promoted to CANON or approved by an owner.
No claim that private/raw evidence, hidden references, repository files, tools, or runtime artifacts were inspected or changed.
